sentences.translation: Staro selo je bilo malo i mirno.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient village was small and quiet.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَعْرِفُونَ بَعْضَهُمُ الْبَعْضَ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su se međusobno dobro poznavali.
sentences.translationEn: The people knew each other well.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يَتَعَاوَنُونَ فِي الْعَمَلِ وَيَتَقَاسَمُونَ الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Sarađivali su u poslu i dijelili hranu.
sentences.translationEn: They cooperated in work and shared food.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْحَيَاةُ فِي الْقَرْيَةِ بَسِيطَةً لَكِنْ سَعِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Život u selu bio je jednostavan ali sretan.
sentences.translationEn: Life in the village was simple but happy.
